nasb.text: Immediately He made the disciples get into the boat and go ahead of Him to the other side, while He sent the crowds away.

esv.text: Immediately he made the disciples get into the boat and go before him to the other side, while he dismissed the crowds.

cnv.text: 耶穌立刻催門徒上船，叫他們先到對岸去，他卻留下來叫群眾散開。

ccb.text: 随后，耶稣催门徒上船，叫他们先渡到湖对岸，祂则遣散众人。

csbs.text: 耶稣立刻催促门徒们上船，要他们先往对岸去；这期间，他自己遣散了人群。
